title: caryophyllata reptans
intro: Caryophyllata reptans, also known as Winter Savory, is a perennial herb native to Europe and North Africa, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Its leaves and stems possess medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Winter Savory include relief from digestive issues, coughs, and colds, as well as its ability to reduce stress and improve sleep quality. Winter Savory can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for natural health enthusiasts.
